basics.description: Deploy a self-contained proof of concept of the AzureGov IDE Coding Assistant into your Azure US Government subscription: an in-boundary Azure OpenAI backend (private-endpoint only), the tamper-evident audit pipeline, and a ready-to-use Windows dev VM that bootstraps VS Code and the extension. Sign in above and pick a subscription, resource group, and region.

basics.name: namePrefix
basics.label: Name prefix
basics.toolTip: Lowercase base name for the deployed resources (3-18 chars, letters/digits/hyphens).

constraints.validationMessage: 3-18 characters: lowercase letters, digits, hyphens; must start with a letter.

toolTip.password: Local administrator password for the dev VM (used to RDP in).

constraints.customValidationMessage: At least 12 characters with a letter, a digit, and a symbol.

basics.name: adminUsername
basics.label: Dev VM administrator username
basics.toolTip: Local administrator username for the dev VM.

constraints.validationMessage: 3-20 characters: lowercase letters and digits; must start with a letter.

elements.name: vmSize
elements.label: VM size
elements.toolTip: Size of the dev box. A 4 vCPU / 16 GB size is a good default.

elements.name: allowedRdpSourceIp
elements.label: Allowed RDP source IP or CIDR
elements.toolTip: Your public IP (for example 203.0.113.5/32). Only this source is allowed to RDP to the dev VM. Use a private link / Bastion for production.

constraints.validationMessage: Enter an IPv4 address or CIDR, e.g. 203.0.113.5 or 203.0.113.0/24.
